commands.review_summary:
The PR persists and broadcasts failed session lifecycle state when WebChat `chat.send` dispatch rejects before an assistant reply, plus a focused gateway regression test.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection rather than an executed local repro. Current main can clear the active WebChat run after dispatch rejection while leaving the persisted session status as `running`, and the added regression test targets that path.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed; this focused maintainer PR has no actionable review findings and needs normal maintainer/CI validation.

target.title: Fix WebChat dispatch failure session status
target.body:
## Summary

- Persist a terminal failed session lifecycle event when WebChat dispatch rejects before an assistant reply.
- Broadcast the matching `sessions.changed` payload with `status: "failed"` and `hasActiveRun: false` so Control UI can clear the active run state.
- Add a regression test covering a running WebChat session whose dispatch rejects before a reply.

## Root Cause

The WebChat `chat.send` async dispatch error path cleaned up the active run and broadcast a chat error, but it did not update persisted session lifecycle state. That left `sessions.list` able to return `status: "running"` with `hasActiveRun: false`, which kept the Control UI in a permanent running state.

## Validation

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server.chat.gateway-server-chat.test.ts src/gateway/session-lifecycle-state.test.ts src/gateway/server.sessions.list-changed.test.ts`
target.author: jesse-merhi
